findings.title: javascript.express.security.audit.sqli.raw-sql
findings.description: Verified SQL injection risk in the Juice Shop login route sample.
findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries for the login path.

findings.title: Example JWT verification weakness
findings.description: Verified vulnerable dependency in the Juice Shop package-lock sample.
findings.remediation: Upgrade jsonwebtoken to a fixed version.

findings.title: Potential committed credential
findings.description: Verified committed credential in the Juice Shop package-lock sample.
findings.remediation: Revoke, rotate, and remove the credential from source control.

findings.title: Web Browser XSS Protection Not Enabled
findings.description: Verified missing browser protection header in the Juice Shop ZAP sample.
